title: Golden Days Emissive Ores
description: Emissive Ores for Golden Days recourse pack
body:
[Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)Golden Days Emissive Ores is a compatibility resource pack designed to enhance visibility while preserving the classic aesthetic of the Golden Days resource pack. It adds subtle emissive effects to all ores, allowing them to glow naturally in dark environments without changing their original textures or colors.

The emissive glow is carefully balanced to feel authentic and unobtrusive, ensuring it complements Golden Days’ nostalgic visuals rather than overpowering them. This pack is ideal for players who want easier ore spotting during mining while staying true to the classic Minecraft look.

Requires [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) to function properly and is intended to be used alongside it.

Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or anyother mod that allows for emisive textures.
